title: Will the high temp in Chicago be >60° on Mar 9, 2025?
subtitle: 61° or above
rules_primary: If the highest temperature recorded at Chicago Midway, IL for March 09, 2025, is greater than 60° according to the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: Not all weather data is the same. While checking a source like AccuWeather or Google Weather may help guide your decision, the official and final value used to determine this market is the highest temperature as reported by the corresponding NWS Climatological Report (Daily) linked in the rules above. Preliminary NWS reporting and measurement methods may be subject to underlying rounding and conversion nuances. Traders should exercise caution when interpreting preliminary NWS data.

title: Shiba Inu price range  on Mar 9, 2025?
rules_primary: If the average of the 60 seconds of CF Benchmarks' Shiba Inu-Dollar Spot Rate (SHIBUSD_RTI) before 5 PM EDT, excluding the top 20% and bottom 20% of values is above 0.000021499 at 5 PM EDT on Mar 9, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: Not all cryptocurrency price data is the same. While checking a source like Google or Coinbase may help guide your decision, the price used to determine this market is based on CF Benchmarks' corresponding Real Time Index (RTI). At the last minute before expiration, 60 RTI prices are collected. The official and final value is the average of these prices, excluding the top 20% (12) and bottom 20% (12) of collected prices.

title: Shiba Inu price range  on Mar 9, 2025?

title: Will it **rain** in New York City on Sunday?
rules_primary: If the number of inches of precipitation recorded at Central Park, New York on March 09, 2025 is strictly greater than 0, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
The Payout Criterion only encompasses Expiration Values that are strictly greater than . If the Expiration Value is T (when the target is 0) for Trace or R for Record (where the record set is strictly greater than ), then the market resolves to Yes.

This market will close and expire the sooner of the first 10:00 AM ET following the release of data for March 09, 2025 or March 16, 2025.

If the Climatological Report is still inconclusive on March 16, 2025, Kalshi will reference the column titled "Weather" in the NWS time series (https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=knyc) for determination via rule 7.2 of the rulebook.

title: Will the **high temp in LA** be >65° on Mar 8, 2025?
rules_primary: If the highest temperature recorded in Los Angeles Airport, CA for March 08, 2025 as reported by the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), is greater than 65°, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: Not all weather data is the same. While checking a source like AccuWeather or Google Weather may help guide your decision, the official and final value used to determine this market is the highest temperature as reported by the corresponding NWS Climatological Report (Daily) linked in the rules above. Preliminary NWS reporting and measurement methods may be subject to underlying rounding and conversion nuances. Traders should exercise caution when interpreting preliminary NWS data.

title: Will it **rain** in New York City on Saturday?
rules_primary: If the number of inches of precipitation recorded at Central Park, New York on March 08, 2025 is strictly greater than 0, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
The Payout Criterion only encompasses Expiration Values that are strictly greater than . If the Expiration Value is T (when the target is 0) for Trace or R for Record (where the record set is strictly greater than ), then the market resolves to Yes.

This market will close and expire the sooner of the first 10:00 AM ET following the release of data for March 08, 2025 or March 15, 2025.

If the Climatological Report is still inconclusive on March 15, 2025, Kalshi will reference the column titled "Weather" in the NWS time series (https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=knyc) for determination via rule 7.2 of the rulebook.

title: Who will President Trump pardon before May 1, 2025?
rules_primary: If the President of the United States has given a presidential pardon, commutation, or reprieve to Derek Chauvin before May 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
Clarification 2/13/25 3:00 AM ET:

The rules for this event state that the payout criterion is: "…<person> has been given a presidential pardon, commutation, or reprieve…"  We acknowledge that one of our Source Agencies, The New York Times, has run an article with the headline "Adams Gets a Reprieve from Trump".  However, after careful analysis, we have determined that this usage of the word "reprieve" is colloquial and not in reference to the actual clemency power granted to the President by the Constitution. Therefore, at the time of writing, the Payout Criterion has NOT yet been met. Article II, Section 2, Clause 1 of the Constitution states: "…[the President] shall have Power to grant Reprieves and Pardons for Offences against the United States…" The Constitution does not further define "reprieve,” but President Trump’s action towards Eric Adams does not appear to be an exercise of this specific clemency power.  In the context of a presidential action, a “reprieve” relates specifically to the postponement of a criminal sentence. See, REPRIEVE, Black's Law Dictionary (12th ed. 2024) (”Temporary postponement of the carrying out of a criminal sentence, esp. a death sentence; esp., an official order halting the execution of a prisoner on death row.”).   The Justice Department's order for Manhattan federal prosecutors to drop the charges does not constitute a reprieve, as Mr. Adams has not been convicted of anything at the time of writing, and it is not a “postponement.”

title: Will **real GDP** increase by more than -1.5% in Q1 2025?

rules_secondary: The market will close at 8:25 AM on the day of the expected release of the data. title: Will Not Like Us be the #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 charts this week?
subtitle: Not Like Us:: Kendrick Lamar
rules_primary: If Not Like Us is the #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 charts for Mar 22, 2025 then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
The Billboard Hot 100 measures music consumption from a Friday to Thursday. This is released as the chart for the Saturday following Thursday (in this case, Mar 22, 2025).

Clarification 7/18/23: In the past, this market has used <date> to refer to the date at the end of the tracking week (the week in which Billboard records music consumption to be eligible for the Hot 100), a Thursday. In the future, the <date> in the Rulebook and the date listed in the short market rules on the market page will refer to the date that a given Billboard chart is dated for, as the Instructions in the market rules model. This is the second Saturday following the end of the tracking week. For example, today's new market will cover music consumption ending Thursday, July 20. The chart will be released on Tuesday, July 25. it will have a <date> corresponding to Saturday, July 29, 2023.

Deputy ministers do not count.

title: Will Trump make 7 trips to Mar-a-Lago as President in Mar 2025?
rules_primary: If Trump makes exactly 7 trips to Mar-a-Lago in Mar 2025 as President, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: A single visit begins when the President arrives in Mar-a-Lago and ends when the President has returned to the White House. A visit need not end to be included – i.e. if Mar 2025 ends with the President still there, that visit counts for the purposes of the count. If the President is in Mar-a-Lago at the beginning of Mar 2025, that will count as a visit.

title: Will the rate of core PCE inflation be above 0.2% in February 2025?
rules_primary: If the (single-decimal) month-over-month percent change in the Personal Consumption Expenditures Price Index excluding food and energy is above 0.2% in February 2025 according to the Bureau of Economic Analysis, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: The market will close at 8:25 AM ET on the expected release of the data. It will expire at the sooner of the first 10:00 AM ET following the release of the data, or one week after the expected release of the data.

title: Will the rate of core PCE inflation be above 0.1% in February 2025?

rules_secondary: The market will close at 8:25 AM ET on the expected release of the data. It will expire at the sooner of the first 10:00 AM ET following the release of the data, or one week after the expected release of the data.

title: Will another LLM be better than Grok 3 before Apr 2025?
rules_primary: If Grok 3 is the model with the highest Arena Elo Score after Issuance and before Apr 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: If there is any day where another model has a higher score than Grok 3, as checked at 10:00 AM ET, then the market immediately resolves to No. For the purposes of this contract, the "Grok 3" market refers to any model that is Grok 3. So if xAI releases a version of Grok 3 called "caramel" and it beats "chocolate", it would not count as Grok 3 being usurped as the top LLM.

title: Will Trump pass a border bill before May 2025?
rules_primary: If a border bill (e.g. one increasing funding for immigration law enforcement, or for a border wall, or restricting services for undocumented immigrants) becomes law before May 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: For the purposes of this Contract, a bill will be considered a border bill and included in the Underlying if it: Increases funding for a border wall on the United States’ southern border with Mexico; Increases immigration services fees (e.g. parole fees immigrants pay to temporarily stay in the United States while their requests for citizenship, residency or asylum are being decided); Taxes remittances; Increases funding for Border Patrol agents and ICE officers; Increases funding for Border Patrol and ICE vehicles or technology; Takes action to restrict undocumented immigrants from using government services; or Otherwise increases funding for immigration law enforcement, U.S. Customs and Border Patrol, or U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

title: What will be the top AI model this month?
rules_primary: If chocolate (Early Grok-3) is the top-ranked AI model on Mar 31, 2025 at 10:00 AM ET, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: If two models are tied under Rank (UB), then the model with the highest Arena Score will win. If two models are still tied after that, then the model with the most votes will win. If two models are still tied after that, the model that was released earlier will win.

title: Will Not Like Us be the #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 charts this week?
subtitle: Not Like Us:: Kendrick Lamar
rules_primary: If Not Like Us is the #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 charts for Mar 15, 2025 then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
The Billboard Hot 100 measures music consumption from a Friday to Thursday. This is released as the chart for the Saturday following Thursday (in this case, Mar 15, 2025).

Clarification 7/18/23: In the past, this market has used <date> to refer to the date at the end of the tracking week (the week in which Billboard records music consumption to be eligible for the Hot 100), a Thursday. In the future, the <date> in the Rulebook and the date listed in the short market rules on the market page will refer to the date that a given Billboard chart is dated for, as the Instructions in the market rules model. This is the second Saturday following the end of the tracking week. For example, today's new market will cover music consumption ending Thursday, July 20. The chart will be released on Tuesday, July 25. it will have a <date> corresponding to Saturday, July 29, 2023.

title: Will DOGE audit Fort Knox before May 2025
rules_primary: If DOGE has initiated an audit of Fort Knox's gold reserves before. May 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: DOGE includes DOGE staff, DOGE teams, and includes other federal government employees that are within a body supervising Fort Knox, e.g. the Department of the Treasury so long as they are reported to be working on the audit under the supervision or direction of DOGE; or Elon Musk. The report must specify that a federal employee working under the direction or supervision of DOGE has made a physical or in-person investigation into the Fort Knox gold reserves in order to be considered an audit.

title: Will DOGE and Elon Musk claim there's missing gold at Fort Knox before May 2025?
rules_primary: If the Department of Government Efficiency and/or Elon Musk claim that there were fewer than previously recorded gold reserves in Fort Knox (as of January 2025, 147,341,858.38 troy ounces of gold) before May 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: Merely stating that there may not be, or that there is evidence suggesting that they may not be, is not encompassed by the Payout Criterion.

rules_primary: If the increase in total non-farm payroll employment is above 300000 as reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics Monthly Employment Situation Report for the month of March 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the Federal Reserve Hike rates by >25bps at their March 2025 meeting?
subtitle: Hike >25bps
rules_primary: If the Federal Reserve does a Hike of >25bps on March 19, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: This market is mutually exclusive. Therefore, if the Federal Reserve hikes by 50bps, the 50bp market will resolve to Yes and the 25bp market will resolve to No. Only one bucket, at maximum, can resolve to Yes.Clarification 10:10 AM ET 8/5/24: If a scheduled FOMC meeting is canceled and does not occur on its scheduled date, then all strikes in this market resolve to No.

Therefore, if the Federal Reserve hikes by 50bps, the 50bp market will resolve to Yes and the 25bp market will resolve to No. Only one bucket, at maximum, can resolve to Yes.Clarification 10:10 AM ET 8/5/24: If a scheduled FOMC meeting is canceled and does not occur on its scheduled date, then all strikes in this market resolve to No.

rules_secondary: In the case of a delay in data caused by a federal government shutdown impacting the reliability of the Source Agency, the market’s latest Expiration Date will be extended to the sooner of the release of the Underlying or six months after the end of the government shutdown.

title: When will Bitcoin hit $150k?
subtitle: $150,000 or above
rules_primary: If the price of Bitcoin is above 149999.99 by Mar 31, 2025 at 11:59 PM ET, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: The Contract is settled by taking an average of CF Benchmarks' Bitcoin Real-Time Index (BRTI) in any sixty second period, excluding the top 20% and bottom 20% of values. Data is used 24/7 to resolve the contract.

title: Will Trump pass a border bill before Apr 2025?
rules_primary: If a border bill (e.g. one increasing funding for immigrantion law enforcement, or for a border wall, or restricts services for undocumented immigrants) becomes law before April 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: For the purposes of this Contract, a bill will be considered a border bill and included in the Underlying if it: Increases funding for a border wall on the United States’ southern border with Mexico; Increases immigration services fees (e.g. parole fees immigrants pay to temporarily stay in the United States while their requests for citizenship, residency or asylum are being decided); Taxes remittances; Increases funding for Border Patrol agents and ICE officers; Increases funding for Border Patrol and ICE vehicles or technology; Takes action to restrict undocumented immigrants from using government services; or Otherwise increases funding for immigration law enforcement, U.S. Customs and Border Patrol, or U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

title: Will Daniel Penny join the Trump Administration?
rules_primary: If Daniel Penny has been nominated or appointed to the Trump Administration (e.g. as a Cabinet Secretary or policy advisor) before May 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: Merely being nominated to a position that requires Senate confirmation (e.g. a federal judgeship or a Cabinet Secretary) is sufficient to resolve as Yes. Clarification 11/14/24 3:00 AM ET: Being a part of a non-governmental organization (which the Department of Government Efficiency, DOGE, may be) is not sufficient to resolve the Contract, even if that organization has some relationship (e.g. is contracted by) with the Trump Administration, if the person in that role is regularly advising the President, or even if that organization receives government financing. However, leading a non-governmental organization *and* holding a Cabinet-level position, or being nominated for one, or holding another position in the White House (e.g. "Senior Policy Advisor") would be sufficient to resolve the Contract.

rules_secondary: Leaving office due to death will not resolve the market to Yes, and the market will remain open.

This position is properly appointed by the head of the US Agency for Global Media. If she is nominated for that position by that person before the market's target date (May 1, 2025), then the market will resolve to Yes.

Clarification 2/5/25 3:00 AM ET: In November, then-President-elect Trump announced that Mr. Musk would lead DOGE. However, at that time, DOGE was planned as a non-governmental organization. While this has since changed, the post does not constitute an official announcement of Musk holding a specific position in the federal government. Therefore, we have determined that the Payout Criterion has not yet been met. The contract will remain open until either Mr. Musk is named to a specific position verifiably within the federal government or until the Expiration Date.

title: Will the upper bound of the federal funds rate be above 5.25% following the Fed's May 7, 2025 meeting?
rules_primary: If the upper bound of the target federal funds rate published on the Federal Reserve's official website is greater than 5.25% following the Federal Reserve's May 7, 2025 meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: This market will expire the first 2:05 PM ET following the release of a Federal Reserve statement for their May 7, 2025 meeting or one week following the last day of that meeting.
